title: COCO 2017
author: Microsoft
short_description: Large-scale benchmark for detection, segmentation, and captioning research.

title: ImageNet 1K
author: ImageNet Team
short_description: Canonical large-scale image classification dataset powering modern representation learning.

title: Cityscapes
author: Daimler AG + MPII
short_description: Fine-grained street-scene annotations for semantic understanding in autonomous driving.

title: LVIS v1
author: FAIR
short_description: Long-tail object categories designed to stress-test recognition of rare classes.

title: KITTI Vision Benchmark
author: KIT + TTI
short_description: Classic benchmark suite for 3D detection, optical flow, and autonomous driving perception.

title: Ego4D
author: Meta AI
short_description: Massive egocentric video collection for multimodal understanding and embodied AI.

title: CIFAR-10
author: MIT and NYU
short_description: A well-known image classification dataset, 10 classes, 32 x 32 pixel images.
